input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.2.3
            TITLE: if the exhaust has any form of active tuning or throttling device or system, the exhaust must

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.2.3: If the exhaust has any form of active tuning or throttling device or system, the exhaust must
IN.10.2.3 If the exhaust has any form of active tuning or throttling device or system, the exhaust must 
meet all requirements with the device or system in all positions.

final_answer: If the exhaust has any form of active tuning or throttling device or system, the exhaust must meet all requirements with the device or system in all positions.
